Proposed Solution(s): Beck-Chat indicates when it cannot provide data; Beck-Noxtua, on the other hand, delivers incorrect content without warning.
Specific Situation/ Task:
Splitted files into multiple steps > Nach mehreren Versuchen und einigen Stunden Vorarbeit hat das Programm tatsächlich die Verträge gelesen, analysiert und Prüfungsergebnisse geliefert, ohne abzustürzen. Leider waren die Ergebnisse jedoch nicht verwertbar. Offenkundig waren der Sachverhalt und die Aufgabenstellung - hier im Zusammenhang mit einer Finanzierung - zu komplex. Da hat fast nichts am Ende gestimmt.

in particular, our tool delivers incorrect or outdated results: Incorrect results during legal research, especially regarding new rulings or legislative changes.

Example weakness in response behavior:
When asked "Give me a GmbH (limited liability company) articles of association → Representation of the managing director → Amend the articles of association due to liquidation," the response was simply: "That's a very important point."
However, the AI ​​did not independently provide the relevant legal content or the necessary articles of association. It was expected that it would directly provide corresponding suggestions or legal text modules.

Insight: The user needs to be able to generate customized workflows in order to handle complex tasks.
Proposed Solution(s):
The user needs predefined workflows, for which the individual steps have to be visible in the tool. 

Users don't yet know how to use AI. We need to work on "workflows" in the future. So, it's not a product issue.
Specific Situation/ Task:
the administrative work is very schematic. E.g. the NÖ-case is applications to grant permissions to attach solar energy panels to existing buildings. Every time this application comes in, the workflow is exactly the same. The path is partially derived from the law, partially from experience working these cases. Usually, each step blocks the next, which is why projects can take months. Only if all steps are fulfilled, may the final decision letter be issued in positive. Declining the request can happen earlier. These workflows have to be visible in the tool as individual steps; 

In the everyday use, the integration is still difficult: Many users have found it difficult to integrate this into their everyday work, partly because workflows are not yet optimally supported.

Direct Quotes: Ich konnte auch aufklären, was es mit § 16 Abs. 1 Nr. VgV auf sich hatte. Es handelt sich um eine veraltete Fassung der Verordnung. Insight: The user wants to be able to set up a workflow that compares a document in the Canvas with an uploaded document and trigger changes so that both of them are matching.
Proposed Solution(s): With a template we could currently cover the prompt instruction, i.e. what to do (compare documents etc.), but what won't work (yet) is the rest (opening Canvas; inserting other document there - at least not in a self-explaining manner).
Specific Situation/ Task:
Their drafting use cases are actually a mix of review and drafting. Typically, you have a parent and a child document - e.g. a loan agreement and a term sheet (key contract terms negotiated in table format). The use case then is to review/compare both of them and check whether everything from the term sheet is correctly reflected in the contract. Otherwise, the contract should be "redlined", i.e. a suggestion for the correct language (based on the term sheet's content) be inserted in track changes.
We made this work by using the Canvas by uploading the to-be-edited document in the Canvas and then the source document in the Chat along with a prompt to check the differences and insert the suggested changes into the Canvas. This eventually worked but also took us briefly to "think around the corner" how to make this typical use case work. Once you know it, you can do it - but it felt like this needed to be more straightforward for this use case pattern which is - speaking from experience - very common (either the document:document comparison or document:checklist/playbook).

Proposed Solution(s): Integration of Beck-Online-Modules, especially Handelsgesellschaftsrecht, Steuerrecht, UGK zum BGB.
Specific Situation/ Task: Research for specific expert topics.

Insight: The user needs the answers to be adapted their role, so that they can use the information best.
Proposed Solution(s): Training the model with (vendor-)specific data and deriving vendor specific answers.
Specific Situation/ Task: Drafting a contract
Direct Quotes: "Das Sprachmodell sich das Beste aus allen Welten suchen (z.B. BeckOFs) und vielleicht sogar schon auf den Prompt eingehen und sagen: „Ich lege einen besonderen Schwerpunkt auf oder ich könnte dann sogar schreiben: „Bitte schreib das aus Sicht des Bestellers oder schreib das aus Sicht des Anbieters (anwenderfreundlich)"

Insight: The user needs to be able to work within their document in one place to work seamlessly and to minimize window/context switching.
Proposed Solution(s): Like the word add-in just really within the same document and not as a side panel.
Specific Situation/ Task: Document Reviewing
Direct Quotes: "und dann wäre es natürlich cool, wenn Noxtua direkt im Dokument auch Gegenvorschläge machen könnte, entweder um die Nachteile abzuschwächen oder die Klausel halt auch mal zu meinen Gunsten umzudrehen."

Insight: Automatically generating document with employees names in Editor
Proposed Solution(s): When user uploads a document containing information about several employees, they want the editor to automatically generate a document with each employee's name already included in the uploaded document.
Specific Situation/ Task: No manual entering each name individually in the editor's document
Source files of the insight:
CSM Beck: 

Hi Niklas,

 

eine Kundin meinte, wenn sie ein Dokument hochlädt in dem es um verschiedene Mitarbeiter geht, möchte sie beispielsweise vom Editor ein Dokument erstellt bekommen aber immer jeweils schon mit dem richtigen Namen des Mitarbeiters aus ihrem hochgeladenen Dokument. 

Also sie möchte daraus abgeleitet nicht ein Dokument aus dem Editor weiter bearbeiten müssen in dem sie einzeln die Namen einträgt. 

 

Ich hoffe das hab ich verständlich wiedergegeben. 😊

 

VG

Karina

Insight: Users cannot clearly tell whether the system is still processing or has already finished, due to missing or unclear progress indicators.
Direct Quotes: nicht immer klare Rückmeldung, ob ein Verarbeitungsvorgang noch läuft oder bereits abgeschlossen ist
